---
title: ""
output:
  pdf_document:
    latex_engine: xelatex
    keep_tex: false
header-includes:
  - \usepackage{xcolor}
  - \usepackage{booktabs}
  - \usepackage{float}
  - \usepackage{graphicx}
  - \usepackage{geometry}
  - \usepackage{tikz}
  - \usepackage{colortbl}
  - \geometry{margin=0.75in}
  - \pagenumbering{gobble}
params:
  pitcher_name: "Pitcher Name"
  session_date: "2026-01-01"
  pitcher_data: NULL
  show_strike_zone: TRUE
  show_pitch_movement: TRUE
  show_extension: TRUE
  show_arm_angle: TRUE
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(
  echo    = FALSE,
  warning = FALSE,
  message = FALSE,
  fig.align = "center",
  fig.width  = 5,
  fig.height = 4,
  dpi = 200
)

library(ggplot2)
library(dplyr)
library(knitr)
library(gridExtra)

# Source only the visualization functions actually called in the report.
# pitch_movement.R is NOT sourced because it depends on ggiraph (interactive
# only); the report builds a static ggplot version inline instead.
# pitcher_extension.R is also rebuilt inline for the same reason.
source("Visualizations/strike_plot.R",        local = TRUE)
source("Visualizations/arm_release_angle.R",  local = TRUE)
source("R/utils_theme.R",                     local = TRUE)

df <- params$pitcher_data
```

\begin{center}
{\Huge \textbf{`r params$pitcher_name`}} \\[6pt]
{\large Session Date: `r params$session_date`}
\end{center}

\vspace{10pt}

```{r count-charts}
# Determine which charts to show and how to lay them out
charts_to_show <- c(
  strike_zone    = params$show_strike_zone,
  pitch_movement = params$show_pitch_movement,
  extension      = params$show_extension,
  arm_angle      = params$show_arm_angle
)
n_charts <- sum(charts_to_show)
```

```{r build-plots, results='hide', fig.keep='none'}
# Pre-build all requested plots so we can arrange them in a grid
plot_list <- list()

if (params$show_strike_zone && !is.null(df)) {
  plot_list[["strike_zone"]] <- strike_plot(df) +
    scale_color_manual(values = PITCH_COLORS, na.value = "grey50") +
    theme(plot.background = element_rect(fill = "white", color = NA))
}

if (params$show_pitch_movement && !is.null(df)) {
  # Build static ggplot version (ggiraph can't render in PDF)
  plot_list[["pitch_movement"]] <- ggplot(
    df,
    aes(
      x = as.numeric(Break_Horizontal),
      y = as.numeric(Break_Induced_Vertical),
      color = Pitch_Type
    )
  ) +
    geom_hline(yintercept = 0, color = "grey40", linewidth = 0.6) +
    geom_vline(xintercept = 0, color = "grey40", linewidth = 0.6) +
    geom_point(size = 3, alpha = 0.85) +
    scale_x_continuous(limits = c(-30, 30), breaks = seq(-30, 30, by = 2.5), expand = c(0, 0)) +
    scale_y_continuous(limits = c(-30, 30), breaks = seq(-30, 30, by = 2.5), expand = c(0, 0)) +
    coord_fixed(ratio = 1) +
    scale_color_manual(values = PITCH_COLORS, na.value = "grey50") +
    labs(
      title = "Pitch Movement Chart",
      x     = "Horizontal movement, in",
      y     = "Vertical movement, in",
      color = NULL
    ) +
    theme_minimal(base_size = 13) +
    theme(
      plot.title       = element_text(hjust = 0.5, face = "plain", size = 14),
      panel.grid.major = element_line(color = "grey88", linewidth = 0.4),
      panel.grid.minor = element_blank(),
      panel.background = element_rect(fill = "white", color = NA),
      plot.background  = element_rect(fill = "white", color = NA),
      legend.position  = "right",
      legend.title     = element_blank(),
      legend.key       = element_rect(fill = "white", color = NA),
      legend.text      = element_text(size = 11),
      axis.text        = element_text(size = 9),
      axis.title       = element_text(size = 11)
    )
}

if (params$show_extension && !is.null(df)) {
  plot_list[["extension"]] <- ggplot(df, aes(
    x     = as.numeric(Extension) * 12,
    y     = as.numeric(Release_Height) * 12,
    color = Pitch_Type
  )) +
    geom_point(size = 3, alpha = 0.85) +
    scale_color_manual(values = PITCH_COLORS, na.value = "grey50") +
    labs(title = "Pitch Extension", x = "Extension (in)", y = "Release Height (in)", color = NULL) +
    theme_minimal(base_size = 13) +
    theme(
      plot.title       = element_text(hjust = 0.5, face = "plain", size = 14),
      panel.grid.major = element_line(color = "grey88", linewidth = 0.4),
      panel.grid.minor = element_blank(),
      panel.background = element_rect(fill = "white", color = NA),
      plot.background  = element_rect(fill = "white", color = NA),
      legend.position  = "right",
      legend.title     = element_blank(),
      legend.key       = element_rect(fill = "white", color = NA),
      legend.text      = element_text(size = 11),
      axis.text        = element_text(size = 9),
      axis.title       = element_text(size = 11)
    )
}

if (params$show_arm_angle && !is.null(df)) {
  plot_list[["arm_angle"]] <- arm_release_angle(df)
}
```

```{r render-charts, fig.width=10, fig.height=9, out.width="100%"}
if (n_charts > 0) {
  ncol_grid <- min(n_charts, 2)
  nrow_grid <- ceiling(n_charts / 2)
  gridExtra::grid.arrange(grobs = plot_list, ncol = ncol_grid, nrow = nrow_grid)
}
```

\vspace{12pt}

```{r pitch-summary-table, results='asis'}
if (!is.null(df)) {

  # --- Pitch-type display name mapping ---
  PITCH_TYPE_NAMES <- c(
    "FF" = "4S Fastball",
    "FT" = "2S Fastball",
    "SI" = "Sinker",
    "FC" = "Cutter",
    "SL" = "Slider",
    "CU" = "Curveball",
    "CH" = "Changeup",
    "SP" = "Splitter",
    "KN" = "Knuckleball",
    "EP" = "Eephus"
  )

  # Helper: hex color -> LaTeX \definecolor command name (sanitised)
  hex_to_latex_name <- function(hex) {
    gsub("#", "clr", hex)
  }

  # --- Build per-pitch-type summary ---
  pitch_summary <- df %>%
    mutate(
      Pitch_Velocity          = as.numeric(Pitch_Velocity),
      Spin_Rate               = as.numeric(Spin_Rate),
      Break_Horizontal        = as.numeric(Break_Horizontal),
      Break_Induced_Vertical  = as.numeric(Break_Induced_Vertical),
      Extension               = as.numeric(Extension),
      Strike_Zone_Position    = as.numeric(Strike_Zone_Position)
    ) %>%
    group_by(Pitch_Type) %>%
    summarise(
      NP              = n(),
      `Pitch Usage %` = round(n() / nrow(df) * 100, 1),
      `AVG Velocity`  = round(mean(Pitch_Velocity, na.rm = TRUE), 1),
      `MAX Velocity`  = round(max(Pitch_Velocity,  na.rm = TRUE), 1),
      `AVG Spin`      = round(mean(Spin_Rate,      na.rm = TRUE), 0),
      `AVG H Movement`= round(mean(Break_Horizontal,       na.rm = TRUE), 1),
      `AVG V Movement`= round(mean(Break_Induced_Vertical, na.rm = TRUE), 1),
      `AVG Extension` = round(mean(Extension,               na.rm = TRUE), 1),
      `Zone%`         = round(
        sum(Strike_Zone_Position %in% 1:9, na.rm = TRUE) / n() * 100, 1
      ),
      .groups = "drop"
    ) %>%
    arrange(desc(NP))

  # --- Build "All Pitches" totals row ---
  totals <- df %>%
    mutate(
      Pitch_Velocity          = as.numeric(Pitch_Velocity),
      Spin_Rate               = as.numeric(Spin_Rate),
      Break_Horizontal        = as.numeric(Break_Horizontal),
      Break_Induced_Vertical  = as.numeric(Break_Induced_Vertical),
      Extension               = as.numeric(Extension),
      Strike_Zone_Position    = as.numeric(Strike_Zone_Position)
    ) %>%
    summarise(
      Pitch_Type      = "All Pitches",
      NP              = n(),
      `Pitch Usage %` = "",
      `AVG Velocity`  = round(mean(Pitch_Velocity, na.rm = TRUE), 1),
      `MAX Velocity`  = round(max(Pitch_Velocity,  na.rm = TRUE), 1),
      `AVG Spin`      = round(mean(Spin_Rate,      na.rm = TRUE), 0),
      `AVG H Movement`= round(mean(Break_Horizontal,       na.rm = TRUE), 1),
      `AVG V Movement`= round(mean(Break_Induced_Vertical, na.rm = TRUE), 1),
      `AVG Extension` = round(mean(Extension,               na.rm = TRUE), 1),
      `Zone%`         = round(
        sum(Strike_Zone_Position %in% 1:9, na.rm = TRUE) / n() * 100, 1
      )
    )

  # --- Replace abbreviations with display names + colored dot ---
  # Build LaTeX color definitions
  color_defs <- ""
  for (abbrev in names(PITCH_COLORS)) {
    cname <- hex_to_latex_name(PITCH_COLORS[abbrev])
    hex_val <- gsub("#", "", PITCH_COLORS[abbrev])
    color_defs <- paste0(color_defs,
      "\\definecolor{", cname, "}{HTML}{", hex_val, "}\n")
  }
  # Fallback for unknown
  color_defs <- paste0(color_defs,
    "\\definecolor{clr999999}{HTML}{999999}\n")

  # Replace Pitch_Type codes with display name + colored dot
  pitch_summary <- pitch_summary %>%
    mutate(
      dot_color = ifelse(
        Pitch_Type %in% names(PITCH_COLORS),
        hex_to_latex_name(PITCH_COLORS[Pitch_Type]),
        "clr999999"
      ),
      Pitch_Type = paste0(
        "\\textcolor{", dot_color, "}{\\Large$\\bullet$} ",
        ifelse(
          Pitch_Type %in% names(PITCH_TYPE_NAMES),
          PITCH_TYPE_NAMES[Pitch_Type],
          Pitch_Type
        )
      )
    ) %>%
    select(-dot_color)

  # --- Combine totals row on top ---
  totals$Pitch_Type <- paste0("\\textbf{", totals$Pitch_Type, "}")
  combined <- bind_rows(totals, pitch_summary)

  # Rename columns to match screenshot
  colnames(combined) <- c(
    "Pitch Type", "NP", "Pitch Usage \\%",
    "AVG Velocity [mph]", "MAX Velocity [mph]",
    "AVG Spin [rpm]",
    "AVG H Movement [in]", "AVG V Movement [in]",
    "AVG Extension [ft]", "Zone\\%"
  )

  # Print color definitions and table
  cat(color_defs)
  cat("\n")

  print(
    knitr::kable(
      combined,
      format    = "latex",
      booktabs  = TRUE,
      escape    = FALSE,
      align     = c("l", rep("r", ncol(combined) - 1)),
      linesep   = ""
    )
  )
}
```
